name: Editor AI
description: Generate Geometry Dash levels using AI!

ai-provider.name: AI Provider
ai-provider.description: Which backend to call. Configure the matching section below.

difficulty.name: Difficulty
difficulty.description: Target difficulty for the AI. Canned values: easy / medium / hard / extreme. Free-form text is also accepted (e.g. 'demon', 'tutorial').

style.name: Style
style.description: Visual / gameplay style. Canned values: modern / retro / flow / memory. Free-form text is also accepted.

length.name: Length
length.description: Approximate level length. Canned values: short / medium / long / xl / xxl. Free-form text is also accepted.

max-objects.name: Max Objects
max-objects.description: Upper bound on objects the AI may emit per generation.

spawn-batch-size.name: Spawn Speed
spawn-batch-size.description: Objects placed per editor tick during preview. Higher = faster but jankier.

ai-ground-y.name: Ground Y
ai-ground-y.description: Editor Y of the visible ground line. 105 is default. Lower if blocks float; higher if they bury.

gemini-api-key.name: Gemini API Key
gemini-api-key.description: From Google AI Studio. Stays on this device in Geode save data.

claude-api-key.name: Claude API Key
claude-api-key.description: From console.anthropic.com. Stays on this device.

openai-api-key.name: OpenAI API Key
openai-api-key.description: From platform.openai.com. Stays on this device.

ministral-api-key.name: Mistral API Key
ministral-api-key.description: From console.mistral.ai. Stays on this device.

huggingface-api-key.name: HF Token
huggingface-api-key.description: From huggingface.co/settings/tokens. Stays on this device.

openrouter-model.name: OpenRouter Model
openrouter-model.description: Provider/model slug, e.g. google/gemini-2.5-flash or anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet.

openrouter-api-key.name: OpenRouter API Key
openrouter-api-key.description: From openrouter.ai/keys. One key, many hosted models.

use-platinum.name: Use Platinum
use-platinum.description: Route Ollama requests through the EditorAI Platinum cloud proxy instead of localhost.

ollama-model.name: Ollama Model Tag
ollama-model.description: Tag as shown by `ollama list`. e.g. entity12208/editorai:v3-7b.

ollama-timeout.name: Ollama Timeout (s)
ollama-timeout.description: How long to wait for a local Ollama response before giving up.

lm-studio-model.name: LM Studio Model
lm-studio-model.description: Loaded model name in LM Studio. Start the server before generating.

llama-cpp-model.name: llama.cpp Model
llama-cpp-model.description: Model name (often 'default' unless your server expects something specific).

custom-provider-name.name: Display Name
custom-provider-name.description: Cosmetic only. Shown in the AI popup info panel.

custom-provider-url.name: Endpoint URL
custom-provider-url.description: Base URL or full /chat/completions URL. OpenAI-compatible bodies are used.

custom-provider-api-key.name: API Key
custom-provider-api-key.description: Leave blank if your server needs no auth.

custom-provider-model.name: Model
custom-provider-model.description: Model name expected by your endpoint.

custom-provider-auth.name: Auth Header Template
custom-provider-auth.description: ${KEY} is replaced with your API key. Clear to send no header.

compact-prompts.name: Compact Prompts
compact-prompts.description: Default ON. Sends a ~3 KB system prompt (vs the full ~60 KB). Cuts cost by ~10× on hosted APIs and runs cleanly on 8K-context local models. Turn off only if you have a >32K-context model and want the full EAS spec + 3,986-entry object catalog in-prompt.

enable-ai-tools.name: Enable AI Tools
enable-ai-tools.description: Let the AI call helper tools (web search, level analysis, song lookup, etc.) before composing.

ai-tools-max-iterations.name: Tool-Use Iterations
ai-tools-max-iterations.description: Max tool-call rounds before forcing a final answer.

enable-advanced-features.name: Triggers & Colors
enable-advanced-features.description: Allow the AI to emit color/move/pulse triggers and group IDs.

enable-rate-limiting.name: Rate Limiting
enable-rate-limiting.description: Throttle generations. Leave on for hosted APIs to avoid quota burns.

rate-limit-seconds.name: Rate Limit (s)
rate-limit-seconds.description: Minimum seconds between generations when rate limiting is on.

show-ai-output.name: Show AI Output
show-ai-output.description: Log the raw AI response for debugging. Off by default.

enable-rating.name: Rate Generations
enable-rating.description: Show the thumbs up/down rating prompt after generation.

max-feedback-examples.name: Feedback Examples
max-feedback-examples.description: How many past rated generations to use as few-shot context.

refinement-rounds.name: Refinement Rounds
refinement-rounds.description: How many self-review passes the AI runs after the initial draft. 0 disables refinement.
